channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: AutoJs6 Connector - Wed Jun 17 03:12:04 UTC 2026
item.description:
Connect WebStorm to AutoJs6 on Android devices. Push JavaScript code from your IDE to the device, execute it, and view logs in real-time.
vendor: programmer_liu downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.autojs6.connector

item.title: LinkedIn Connected Apps - Wed Jun 17 08:30:58 UTC 2026
item.description:
